title: Purohit
name: Acharya Vasishta
description: The chief priest and spiritual advisor. He advocates for righteous conduct, religious observances, and maintaining the social order.

title: Senapati
name: General Bheema
description: The supreme commander of the armed forces. He believes strength, discipline, and territorial security are paramount.

title: Amatya
name: Minister Chanakya
description: The chief minister of state and finance. He focuses on a full treasury, effective taxation, and diplomatic leverage.

title: Shreshthi
name: Merchant Dhanananda
description: The head of the merchant guilds. He desires prosperity, thriving trade, patronage of the arts, and worldly comforts.
